# datahub_corp_group (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub group (`corpGroup`) by `group_id`.

Use this to reference a group that already exists in DataHub -- for example one created in the DataHub UI or by your identity provider -- as a policy actor or owner.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing group by its group_id (the URN suffix).
data "datahub_corp_group" "data_platform" {
  group_id = "data-platform"
}

output "data_platform_group_urn" {
  value = data.datahub_corp_group.data_platform.urn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) The unique identifier of the group to look up (the URN suffix).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the group. Empty if not set.
- `email` (String) Contact email address for the group. Empty if not set.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name of the group.
- `slack` (String) Slack channel or handle for the group. Empty if not set.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this group (e.g. `urn:li:corpGroup:data-platform`).
